# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We support security updates for the following versions of SmartClipboard:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| >= 1.0  | ✅ Yes     |
| < 1.0   | ❌ No      |

*Note: Please ensure you are always running the latest release of SmartClipboard to receive any security fixes.*

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, **please do not open a public issue.** Reporting security issues publicly can expose all users to potential risk.

Instead, please report security vulnerabilities by creating a **private security advisory** on GitHub:

1. Go to the repository's home page: [github.com/saihgupr/SmartClipboard](https://github.com/saihgupr/SmartClipboard)
2. Click on the **Security** tab.
3. Under the **Vulnerability reporting** section on the left sidebar, click **Report a vulnerability** to start a private advisory.

Once a vulnerability report is submitted, we will review it, work on a fix, and coordinate a public disclosure in a timely manner. Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
